arts.ttl: Arsenal in ‘advanced talks’ to sign Real Sociedad star
arts.sum: Premier League giants Arsenal are on the verge of closing a deal for a leading member of the midfield ranks at Real Sociedad. That’s according to transfer insider Fabrizio Romano,…

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou confirms Tottenham attacker could be leaving this January
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are gearing up for an active January transfer window, both in terms of incoming signings and potential loan moves for their young players. They have already secured the signing of 21-year-old goalkeeper Antonin Kinsky from Slavia Prague earlier this month. arts.ttl: How Many Games Will Gabriel Jesus Miss for Arsenal?
arts.sum: Gabriel Jesus will miss the rest of the 2024–25 season for Arsenal after tearing his ACL against Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Conte Wants to Sign £200k-p/w Tottenham Star to Replace Kvaratskhelia
arts.sum: Napoli have identified Tottenham Hotspur forward Timo Werner as a potential replacement for PSG-bound Khvicha Kvaratskhelia.

arts.ttl: Charles Watts: Arsenal ‘Could Move’ for ‘Insane’ Star in January
arts.sum: Arsenal could look to source a replacement for Bukayo Saka and one club insider has touted a Premier League star as a 'fantastic' target

arts.ttl: Tottenham's Ange Postecoglou hits out at 'vile' chants from Tamworth fans
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur manager Ange Postecoglou has hit out at the “vile” chants he received from Tamworth fans during his club’s FA Cup win.

arts.ttl: Arsenal have just poached key behind-the-scenes figure from Liverpool after £118m triumph
Randal Kolo Muani makes decision on Man Utd & Tottenham interest
arts.sum: PSG striker Randal Kolo Muani has rejected interest from Man Utd & Tottenham in favour of a loan move to Juventus.
